title: enneastemon vogelii
intro: Enneastemon vogelii, also known as Vogel's enneastemon, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rutaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Enneastemon vogelii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Enneastemon vogelii typically involve the leaves and bark, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
